title: Enchantments Overful
body:
# 🛠️ **Minecraft Enchantment Changes**
🛡️ Armor Enchantments ### 🔄 *All Armor Pieces* - **Protection** — Max Level: **VI** - **Blast Protection** — Max Level: **VI** - **Fire Protection** — Max Level: **VI** - **Projectile Protection** — Max Level: **VI** - **Thorns** — Max Level: **X** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Binding** — Max Level: **I** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I** ### 🪖 *Helmet* - **Respiration** — Max Level: **V** - **Aqua Affinity** — Max Level: **III** ### 🩳 *Leggings* - **Swift Sneak** — Max Level: **IV** ### 👢 *Boots* - **Feather Falling** — Max Level: **IX** - **Depth Strider** — Max Level: **III** - **Frost Walker** — Max Level: **IV** - **Soul Speed** — Max Level: **V**
⚔️ Sword Enchantments - **Sharpness** — Max Level: **X** - **Smite** — Max Level: **X** - **Bane of Arthropods** — Max Level: **X** - **Knockback** — Max Level: **IX** - **Fire Aspect** — Max Level: **IX** - **Looting** — Max Level: **VIII** - **Sweeping Edge** — Max Level: **V** - **Breach** — Max Level: **V** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I**
🔨 Mace Enchantments - **Wind Burst** — Max Level: **V** - **Density** — Max Level: **X** - **Breach** — Max Level: **V** - **Knockback** — Max Level: **IX** - **Fire Aspect** — Max Level: **IX** - **Looting** — Max Level: **VIII** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I**
🏹 Bow Enchantments - **Power** — Max Level: **X** - **Punch** — Max Level: **IV** - **Flame** — Max Level: **I** - **Infinity** — Max Level: **I** - **Multishot** — Max Level: **III** - **Piercing** — Max Level: **VII** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II**
🎯 Crossbow Enchantments - **Quick Charge** — Max Level: **V** - **Infinity** — Max Level: **I** - **Multishot** — Max Level: **III** - **Piercing** — Max Level: **VII** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **I** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I**
🌊 Trident Enchantments - **Sharpness** — Max Level: **X** - **Smite** — Max Level: **X** - **Bane of Arthropods** — Max Level: **X** - **Impaling** — Max Level: **X** - **Breach** — Max Level: **V** - **Loyalty** — Max Level: **III** - **Riptide** — Max Level: **VII** - **Channeling** — Max Level: **I** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I** > ⚠ Riptide & Loyalty cannot be combined.
🪓 Tool Enchantments *(Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe)* - **Efficiency** — Max Level: **X** - **Fortune** — Max Level: **V** - **Silk Touch** — Max Level: **I** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I** > ⚠ Silk Touch & Fortune cannot be combined.
🎣 Fishing Rod Enchantments - **Luck of the Sea** — Max Level: **V** - **Lure** — Max Level: **V** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I**
🪽 Elytra Enchantments - **Protection** — Max Level: **VI** - **Thorns** — Max Level: **X** - **Unbreaking** — Max Level: **V** - **Mending** — Max Level: **II** - ❌ **Curse of Binding** — Max Level: **I** - ❌ **Curse of Vanishing** — Max Level: **I**
🪵 Stick Enchantments - **Knockback** — Max Level: **IX**
